hibernate-mapping.query: select count(b.id) from com.mckesson.eig.roi.admin.model.RelatedFeeType b where b.feeTypeId = ?
select feetype.id, feetype.name, feetype.chargeAmount, feetype.description, feetype.salesTax from com.mckesson.eig.roi.admin.model.FeeType feetype order by feetype.name asc
select feetype.id, feetype.name from com.mckesson.eig.roi.admin.model.FeeType feetype order by feetype.name asc
select feetype from com.mckesson.eig.roi.admin.model.FeeType feetype where feetype.name = ?
hibernate-mapping.sql-query:
SELECT DISTINCT feeType.ROI_FeeType_Seq id, feeType.Created_By_Seq createdBy, feeType.Modified_Dt modifiedDate, feeType.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, feeType.Record_Version recordVersion, feeType.Organization_Seq orgId, feeType.Name name, feeType.Description description, feeType.ChargeAmount chargeAmount, feeType.SalesTaxEnable salesTax
FROM cabinet..ROI_FeeType feeType, cabinet..ROI_RequestorTypeToBillingTemplate typeToTemplate, cabinet..ROI_BillingTemplateToFeeType billingTemplate
WHERE billingTemplate.ROI_BillingTemplate_Seq = typeToTemplate.ROI_BillingTemplate_Seq AND billingTemplate.ROI_FeeType_Seq = feeType.ROI_FeeType_Seq AND typeToTemplate.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = :requestorTypeId
